Designing Tomorrow.
About Us

WHO WE ARE

Emart Digital Media is a Zambia-based creative design studio specialising in brand identity, print design, and social media graphics. We work with startups, small businesses, entrepreneurs, and established companies who understand that strong visual identity is not optional — it is the foundation of trust.

Our catalogue is structured to serve clients at every stage: from businesses launching for the first time to those scaling their digital presence across multiple platforms. Every design we deliver is print-ready and digital-optimised, supplied in full professional file formats.

We believe great design should be accessible, not intimidating. That is why our packages are transparent, clearly scoped, and built around real business needs.

Precision

Pixel-perfect execution on every deliverable, every time.

Speed

Fast turnaround without sacrificing quality or detail.

Clarity

Clear scopes, no hidden costs, no surprises at delivery.

Value

Bundles designed to give you more for every kwacha spent.

What We Offer

SERVICE CATALOGUE

Every service includes professional-grade file delivery (PNG, PDF, SVG, and editable source files), designed for both digital and print use. Bundled packages represent the fastest path from idea to a live, fully branded business.

⚡
Flagship Launch Package
The complete first-impression solution for new businesses
Most Popular
Start-Up Bundle
Everything a new business needs to launch with authority. A complete brand identity and digital-ready presence delivered as one cohesive package — our flagship offering.
  • ✓ Logo Design (3 concepts, unlimited revisions)
  • ✓ Business Card Design (print-ready)
  • ✓ Company Profile (up to 8 pages, fully branded)
  • ★ FREE: Social Media Profiles Set Up (Facebook, Instagram, LinkedIn, X, TikTok)
Company Profile
A professionally designed company profile document — ideal for pitching to clients, partners, and investors.
  • ✓ Up to 8 fully branded pages
  • ✓ Custom layout and typography
  • ✓ PDF + editable source file
Banner Design (Print)
High-resolution print banners for events, storefronts, and expos. Supplied in CMYK-ready format at your specified dimensions.
  • ✓ Custom size to specification
  • ✓ Print-ready CMYK file
  • ✓ 2 design concepts included
✦
Brand Identity
Individual identity services for businesses at any stage
Flyer Design
Eye-catching promotional flyers for events, launches, sales, or services — designed for both digital sharing and print distribution.
  • ✓ A4 / A5 / Custom size
  • ✓ Print-ready + digital version
  • ✓ 2 revision rounds
  • ✓ Delivered in 48 hours
Best Value
Logo Design + Free Business Card
A professional logo paired with a matching business card at no extra charge — your brand identity foundation, delivered together.
  • ✓ 3 logo concepts, full revisions
  • ✓ Supplied in PNG, SVG, and PDF
  • ★ FREE: Matching Business Card Design
  • ✓ Print-ready files included
Business Card Design
Standalone business card design for professionals who already have a logo and need a polished card that makes a strong impression.
  • ✓ Standard or custom dimensions
  • ✓ Single or double-sided
  • ✓ CMYK print-ready file
  • ✓ 2 design concepts
◈
Social Media Design
Consistent branded content that keeps your pages active and professional
Monthly Design Retainer — Ongoing Monthly Service
A recurring monthly agreement for businesses that require consistent, high-quality social media design without commissioning each piece individually. Scope and deliverable count agreed per contract.
  • ✓ Agreed number of designs per month
  • ✓ Branded templates for consistency
  • ✓ Priority turnaround for retainer clients
  • ✓ Monthly review and revision cycle
  • ✓ Formats supplied for all major platforms

  • ✓ 5 custom social media graphics
  • ✓ Sized for Facebook, Instagram & more
  • ✓ High-res files supplied

  • ✓ 30 custom social media graphics

  • ✓ All platform sizes included

  • ✓ Priority delivery — 7 business days

Why Emart Digital Media

WHAT SETS US APART

⚡
Fast Turnaround

Most single-item orders delivered within 48 hours. Bundle orders within 3–5 business days. Retainer clients receive priority scheduling.

📁
Complete File Delivery

Every order includes high-resolution PNG, print-ready PDF, SVG, and editable source files. Your assets — no format lock-in, ever.

🔄
Revisions Included

Bundle and retainer orders include unlimited revisions within scope. You never pay extra to get it right.

📐
Print & Digital Ready

All designs are dual-purpose: optimised for screen and prepared to commercial print specification — CMYK, bleed, and crop marks included.

How It Works

OUR PROCESS

01
Brief & Order

Contact us with your service selection. We send a short brief to understand your brand, colours, and preferences.

02
Concept & Design

Initial concepts are developed based on your brief — typically 2–3 options delivered for your review.

03
Review & Refine

You provide feedback and we revise until the design fully meets your expectations within the agreed scope.

04
Final Delivery

Approved files are packaged in all required formats — ready to use immediately for print or digital.
